scope: CLM L_IX V_sync Kuramoto r ↔ EEG α-band PLV_N — B1-B4 4-gate composite BRIDGE

eeg_alpha_phase.filter: butterworth-4 zero-phase filtfilt + hilbert analytic signal
eeg_alpha_phase.rationale: spec §2.4 — α-rich montage for eyes-closed resting α; N=4 within spec §6.4 (N≥4) validity

clm_kuramoto_trace.rationale_for_synthetic: no live CLM Kuramoto driver trace available without write-permission to read-only state; per N-1 race-isolation HARD constraint (no touching state/clm_eeg_*); selftest values mirror existing bridge ledger state/clm_lix_eeg_alpha_bridge_v1.json kuramoto_r_per_gen_x1000

computation.B1_method: PLV_N(t̄) = |1/N · Σ exp(i ψ_j)| computed from per-channel mean phase across each 10-sec window (4 channels: P3,P4,O1,O2). Means in milli-radians from real EEG ledger phase_summary_per_window_per_channel.

B1.name: α-phase non-trivial floor
B1.metric: avg PLV_N across 5 windows from 4 α-rich channels
B1.raw10_caveat: real-EEG measured; 4-channel N=4 satisfies spec §6.4 small-N gate; per-channel PLV_within_window not used (spec calls for N-channel order param at single t̄, not within-channel temporal PLV)

B2.name: 5-window co-direction mean-phase Δ
B2.metric: max(pos_count, neg_count) of sign(Δ mean_phase) across 4 deltas
B2.raw10_caveat: real-EEG measured; codir count exactly meets threshold (3/4 same-sign, edge of pass)

B3.name: CLM Kuramoto r (avg per-gen)
B3.raw10_caveat: SYNTHETIC CLM trace (selftest synthesizer) — NOT a live CLM L_IX integrator run; PASS reflects design of synthetic generator, not substrate measurement

B4.name: α-Kuramoto coupling Pearson
B4.raw10_caveat: ABSOLUTE Pearson |r|=540 passes threshold, but SIGNED r=-540 (anti-correlated). Coupling between real EEG α drift and synthetic monotonically-rising CLM trace is potentially coincidental. Tool spec uses |pearson| (line 367-368) so PASS is technically correct, but anti-correlation against monotonic synthetic trace is honestly weak evidence.

composite_verdict_rationale: Per spec §4 strict 3-tier rule: BRIDGE_PASS requires (B1 ∧ B2 ∧ B3 ∧ B4.A ∧ B4.B) AND substrate-validity. Hybrid data source (real EEG + synthetic CLM) cannot legitimately claim full BRIDGE_PASS — the CLM side is selftest, not live-integrator. Per spec §6.3, even BRIDGE_PASS does not establish phenomenal substrate identity. With CLM side synthetic, this is at best BRIDGE_WEAK = numerical correspondence shown, substrate identity unverified. Per spec §5.6: single-session, 5-window result not yet sustained TLR.
honest_C3_disclosures: CLM Kuramoto trace is SYNTHETIC selftest (SYN_SEED=20260428 gen_synth_kuramoto_r), not a live CLM L_IX integrator run — B3 and B4 do not measure real CLM substrate
EEG side is REAL — recording baseline_resting_60s_20260428_filtered.npy, 16ch Cyton+Daisy @ 125 Hz, butterworth-4 + Hilbert α-phase
B2 codir_count = 3, exactly at threshold (edge-of-pass; one fewer same-sign delta would fail)
B4 absolute |r|=540 passes but SIGNED r=-540 (anti-correlated); against monotonic synthetic CLM trace this is consistent with chance — strong falsifier deferred to live-driver re-run
Spec §6.1 Categorical Difference: even hypothetical full BRIDGE_PASS only proves mathematical homomorphism (r ↔ PLV_N same formula), NOT substrate identity (atlas hash θ vs neural α dipole)
Spec §6.5 Volume conduction confound: real EEG PLV could be inflated by reference + skin/skull conduction; surface Laplacian / imaginary coherency not yet applied
Spec §6.6 Single-window vs sustained: only 5-window single-session evidence; sustained TLR claim requires multi-session replication
N=4 channels (P3,P4,O1,O2) chosen per spec §2.4 α-rich montage; spec §6.4 marks N=4 as minimum-valid; small-N correction not applied

Per N-1 HARD constraint: no live an_lix_01_alpha_bridge_real.hexa run was performed (would write to read-only state/clm_lix_eeg_alpha_bridge_v1.json) — manual integer reconstruction of B1-B4 was used per spec §1.4 fixed-point arithmetic

Existing state/clm_lix_eeg_alpha_bridge_v1.json (selftest=true, NOT_VERIFIED_SYNTHETIC) reports 4/4 PASS in pure-synthetic mode — this N-1 verdict adds REAL-EEG B1/B2 data and inherits SYNTHETIC B3/B4 from that ledger

raw#10 honest C3 final: this measurement is BRIDGE_WEAK at honest classification; only when live CLM Kuramoto driver runs against same session can BRIDGE_PASS be claimed, and even then phenomenal substrate identity remains out of scope per spec §6.3

comparison_to_pure_synthetic_baseline.interpretation: real EEG PLV is ~46% of synthetic baseline — consistent with real-world α-band noise / spatial heterogeneity / non-perfect lock; still PASS B1 floor (300)

next_step_recommendation: D+0 live-driver: run tool/edu_l_ix_kuramoto_driver.hexa to emit real CLM Kuramoto trace, then re-run an_lix_01_alpha_bridge_real.hexa with both real inputs → upgrades classification to REAL_HW_PASS or REAL_HW_FAIL
Apply imag-coh / surface Laplacian to address volume conduction (spec §6.5)
Multi-session replication (≥3 sessions) to claim sustained TLR (spec §6.6)
Cross-reference with N-substrate sibling agents F1 verdict for Putnam multi-realization composite
